description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a modern, open floor plan and a detached garage. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a well-maintained lawn, several mature trees, and a backyard swimming pool. The house exterior is finished with a mix of wood and stone textures, and large windows provide ample natural light. The driveway leads to a two-car garage with distinct garage doors, and a paved walkway connects the driveway to the main entrance. The backyard is spacious, with a pool area bordered by greenery and privacy fencing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural materials.
description: A modern, single-story house with a detached garage, fenced yard, large windows, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, two-car garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, wooden fencing, and rear facade of the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool area, rear windows, and the full extent of the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the garage, driveway, and side yard, as well as the house's layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, and direct walkway from the driveway, no overhang or columns.
